name: omx-switchboard
description: Task-aware routing layer that chooses between native Codex and oh-my-codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically choose the right Codex or OMX workflow
interface.longDescription: OMX Switchboard is a policy-driven routing layer for Codex. It keeps small tasks on native Codex, escalates ambiguous work to deep-interview, pushes design-heavy work to ralplan, and only uses ralph or team when the task is truly execution-ready. Install the `omxr` launcher to make automatic routing your default entrypoint.
defaultPrompt: Use $omx-switchboard to choose the best workflow for this task.
Route this engineering task between native Codex and OMX.
Pick the safest low-overhead execution mode for this request.
